title: helianthus mollis
intro: Helianthus mollis, also known as Downy Sunflower, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthus mollis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal preparations.
